name: Timur "Glaz" Glazkov
description:
|| a suitcase with paints

Winter gripped the world in an icy embrace. The air was clear and crisp, and the boundless expanses, blanketed in deep snow, blinded the eyes with an unimaginable whiteness. The cold wind sang its thin, piercing song, raising clouds of sparkling dust from the tops of the fir trees. The landscape was so perfect it took your breath away, as if nature itself had decided to become an artist, taking a whole suitcase of paints with it just to find that one, singular point of inspiration.
creator: Kulya
